---
title: "Block 4"
---

## Folien

[Folien im Vollbild öffnen](slides/folien-viewer.html?file=Folien_Block4.pdf){target="_blank"}

```{=html}
<iframe class="responsive-iframe"
        src="slides/folien-viewer.html?file=Folien_Block4.pdf"
        title="Folien Block 4"
        style="width:100%; aspect-ratio:16/9; min-height:520px; border:1px solid #e3e3e3; border-radius:10px;">
</iframe>
```
